glosses.ro: în față; în partea din față

translations.en: I sit in the front of the bus.
translations.es: Estoy sentado adelante en el autobús.
translations.fr: Je suis assis à l'avant du bus.
translations.it: Sono seduto nella parte anteriore dell'autobus.
translations.pt: Estou sentado na frente do ônibus.
translations.vi: Tôi ngồi ở phía trước xe buýt.
translations.hi: मैं बस के आगे बैठा हूँ।
translations.el: Κάθομαι στο μπροστινό μέρος του λεωφορείου.
translations.id: Saya duduk di bagian depan bus.
translations.sv: Jag sitter längst fram i bussen.
translations.ro: Stau în partea din față a autobuzului.
translations.ja: バスの前のほうに座っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; denotes seated posture.
Locative adverb meaning ‘at the front’; adverbial of place specifying the front area.
Contraction of ‘in dem’; preposition introducing a dative noun phrase expressing location.
Common noun, masculine; head of the PP ‘im Bus’; dative singular (static location).

sentences.target: Die Kasse ist vorn beim Eingang.

translations.de: Die Kasse ist vorn beim Eingang.
translations.en: The checkout is at the front by the entrance.
translations.es: La caja está adelante, junto a la entrada.
translations.fr: La caisse est à l'avant, près de l'entrée.
translations.it: La cassa è davanti, vicino all'ingresso.
translations.ko: 계산대는 가게 앞쪽 입구 근처에 있어요.
translations.pt: O caixa fica na frente, perto da entrada.
translations.vi: Quầy thu ngân ở phía trước, gần lối vào.
translations.nl: De kassa is voorin bij de ingang.
translations.hu: A pénztár elöl van, a bejáratnál.
translations.hi: काउंटर आगे, प्रवेश द्वार के पास है।
translations.pl: Kasa jest z przodu, przy wejściu.
translations.el: Το ταμείο είναι μπροστά, δίπλα στην είσοδο.
translations.id: Kasir ada di depan, dekat pintu masuk.
translations.sv: Kassan är längst fram vid entrén.
translations.ro: Casa de marcat este în față, lângă intrare.
translations.ja: レジは入口の近くにあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of ‘Kasse’.
Common noun, feminine; subject in nominative singular.
Finite copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links the subject to a locative predicate.
Locative adverb ‘at the front’; forms part of the predicative locative expression.
Contraction of ‘bei dem’; preposition requiring dative; introduces NP ‘Eingang’.
Common noun, masculine; object of ‘bei’ in dative singular (‘beim Eingang’).

sentences.target: Das Heft liegt vorn auf dem Tisch.
sentences.reading: /das hɛft liːkt fɔʁn aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/

translations.de: Das Heft liegt vorn auf dem Tisch.
translations.ipa: /das hɛft liːkt fɔʁn aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/
translations.en: The notebook is at the front of the table.
translations.es: El cuaderno está en la parte frontal de la mesa.
translations.fr: Le cahier est sur le devant de la table.
translations.it: Il quaderno è sul tavolo, davanti.
translations.zh-Hans: 笔记本放在桌子靠前的位置上。
translations.pt: O caderno está na parte da frente da mesa.
translations.vi: Cuốn vở nằm ở phía trước trên mặt bàn.
translations.nl: Het schrift ligt vooraan op de tafel.
translations.hu: A füzet elöl van az asztalon.
translations.hi: कापी मेज़ के आगे वाले हिस्से पर रखी है।
translations.pl: Zeszyt leży z przodu na stole.
translations.el: Το τετράδιο είναι στο μπροστινό μέρος του τραπεζιού.
translations.id: Buku catatan ada di bagian depan meja.
translations.sv: Häftet ligger längst fram på bordet.
translations.ro: Caietul este în față pe masă.
translations.ja: ノートは机の手前に置いてあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, neuter nominative singular; determiner of ‘Heft’.
Common noun, neuter; subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb, present 3rd person singular; denotes static position/location.
Locative adverb ‘at the front’; adverbial of place.
Preposition; with static location it governs dative; introduces NP ‘dem Tisch’.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of ‘Tisch’.
Common noun, masculine; object of ‘auf’ in dative singular.

sentences.target: Er steht vorn in der Reihe.

translations.de: Er steht vorn in der Reihe.
translations.en: He is at the front of the line.
translations.es: Él está primero en la fila.
translations.fr: Il est en tête de la file.
translations.ko: 그는 줄 맨 앞에 서 있어요.
translations.pt: Ele está no início da fila.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đứng ở đầu hàng.
translations.nl: Hij staat vooraan in de rij.
translations.hi: वह कतार के सबसे आगे खड़ा है।
translations.id: Dia berdiri paling depan dalam antrean.
translations.sv: Han står längst fram i kön.
translations.ja: 彼は列のいちばん前にいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present 3rd person singular; denotes upright position.
Locative adverb ‘at the front’; adverbial of place.
Preposition; with static location governs dative; introduces NP ‘der Reihe’.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of ‘Reihe’.
Common noun, feminine; object of ‘in’ in dative singular (‘in der Reihe’).
